landing.quote: Our goal should be minimum standardization of human behavior.
landing.tagline: Connect People - Share Responsibility - Strengthen Community.
landing.description: is the structural foundation for communities that function as societies based on shared responsibility, not hierarchy. We provide the legal, spatial, and digital orders that make authentic community possible.
landing.membership_benefits:
Access to all three organizational orders
The right to create unlimited communities and connected societies
Possibility to participate in any number of circles.
landing.join_heading: Join the return to our natural order
landing.join_description: connects you with communities worldwide that demonstrate another way of organizing human relationships. From hotels without hierarchies to businesses without traditional ownership - experience communities that work with human nature instead of against it.
landing.hero_img_alt: Modern conference room with circular roundtable and red chairs

hub.title: Your Communities
hub.load_error: Could not load your communities. Please try again.
hub.empty: You are not a member of any community yet.

join.title: Join a Community
join.subtitle: Enter the invite code you received to join a community.
join.label: Invite Code
join.error_invalid: Invalid invite code. Please check and try again.
join.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.identity_verified_desc: You are an IDENTIFIED shaRe Member with full platform access.
profile.identity_unverified_desc: Identify yourself to unlock full participation and protect your shaRe presence from impersonation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
settings.error_401: Session expired. Please sign out and sign back in.
settings.picture_success: Profile picture updated. Changes appear after your next login.
settings.picture_size_error: File must be a PNG and under 5 MB.

verify.title: Verify your identity
verify.subtitle: Become an IDENTIFIED shaRe Member — one person, one account, guaranteed.
verify.step1_detail: Your ID card must have the online eID function enabled (most cards issued after 2010).
verify.step2_detail: Download the official AusweisApp2 app to read your ID card via NFC.
verify.step3_detail: You set this PIN when you activated the online eID function at your local authority.
verify.privacy: We store only a cryptographic hash of your ID — no name, address, or biometric data is retained.
verify.success_desc: You are now an IDENTIFIED shaRe Member. Redirecting to your profile…
verify.already_verified_desc: Your identity is confirmed. You have full platform access.
verify.error_cancelled: Verification was cancelled. You can try again.
verify.error_invalid_state: Invalid session state. Please start over.
verify.error_duplicate: This eID is already linked to another shaRe Member account. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
verify.error_start: Could not start eID verification. Please try again.

banner.unidentified: Your identity is not yet verified.
